notes:
The Knockout Bracket is now open!

You'll find it as a sub-tab alongside Group Stage and Tournament inside the Predict page. Tap Predict and you'll automatically redirected to the Knockout bracket. Everything else works exactly as before: pick scores for each round, the advancing team is derived from the higher score, and a tie-breaker prompt appears for level scorelines.

The advancing-team bonus now rewards consecutive correct predictions. Each time you correctly predict the team that advances, your streak grows by 1 and the bonus increases: 5 pts for the 1st correct, 10 for the 2nd in a row, 15 for the third, and so on. Miss one and the streak resets. Your next correct pick starts back at 5 pts. The 90-minute scoreline points (exact score, goal difference, correct outcome) are unaffected by this multiplier. You can read this again in the Rules page.
